name: dr. Ayu Pratiwi
title: dr.
education: M.D., Faculty of Medicine, Universitas Udayana, Bali (2012)
bio: dr. Ayu Pratiwi is a dedicated general practitioner with over 10 years of experience serving patients in Bali. She has a special interest in travel medicine and tropical diseases, making her an excellent choice for international visitors requiring medical care.
